claim: Extended context windows (200k+ tokens) enable processing entire codebases, documents, or conversation histories without truncation
actionable: For tasks requiring full document/codebase analysis, use models with extended context; fits entire repos in context

claim: Extended thinking enables models to reason through complex problems step-by-step, improving accuracy on hard logic/math tasks
actionable: For complex reasoning tasks, enable thinking mode to show working; latency increases but correctness improves significantly
